response.justification: Strong senior fullstack candidate with 15+ years of experience well beyond the 6+ year requirement. Recent role at re:cinq directly matches the target stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and includes AI-agent infrastructure work with MCP code generators, which aligns precisely with the required AI agent development skill. Demonstrated breadth across MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, plus a strong software-craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development). Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mentions, and Kotlin/Java exposure is limited and dated.
strengths: Direct AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflows)
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack track record across multiple senior roles
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the resume
No explicit Vitest experience; testing background is broad but framework-specific fit unclear
Kotlin/Java exposure is light and not recent
